question.content: For the air-compression refrigeration cycle with the given state data, compute compressor theoretical specific work for both no-regeneration and regeneration cases under constant-specific-heat ideal-gas assumptions. Output exactly two decimal numbers separated by one comma as no_regen,regen, plain ASCII only, no Chinese characters, no unit text, no percent sign, no fraction, no equation form, and no extra text.

step_1.content: Set the two cycle cases and compute compressor work from the corresponding temperature rise.

step_3.content: Analyze panel 1 of 2 and record the intermediate relation needed before moving to the next panel.
step_3.key_point: Set up the relation for compressor specific work in both cases.

step_5.content: Report both specific-work values in the required order.
step_5.key_point: Report both specific-work values in the required order.
